evals.prompt: Show me analytics for all my SkillStack plugins over the last 30 days.
evals.expected_output: Skill asks about filters, calls skillstack_creator_stats, and displays a formatted dashboard with correct metric names
expectations: Asks about time period filter (7d, 30d, 90d, all)
Asks about plugin filter (specific or all)
Calls skillstack_creator_stats MCP tool with period and optional plugin_slug
Uses 'Active Buyers' label (from active_buyers field, NOT unique_buyers)
Displays results in a formatted dashboard layout

evals.prompt: Show me stats for just my 'analytics-pro' plugin for the last 90 days.
evals.expected_output: Skill filters to specific plugin and time period, shows single-plugin format
expectations: Shows single-plugin dashboard format (not multi-plugin summary)
Includes active_buyers, total_installs, paid/free split, update_checks

evals.prompt: Show me my plugin stats. I haven't published any plugins yet.
evals.expected_output: Skill handles empty results gracefully with guidance to publish first
expectations: Handles empty or no-data response from skillstack_creator_stats
Informs creator that no analytics data was found
Suggests publishing a plugin with /publish first
